projectDescription: A research-backed catalog of UI antipatterns and accessibility failures, with WCAG/Nielsen references, business impact data, and production-ready code fixes.
keyFeatures: 120+ documented UI antipatterns across 12 structured categories
WCAG 2.1/2.2 accessibility violation references per pattern
Nielsen's 10 usability heuristics mapped to each antipattern
Business impact quantification with real conversion data
Impact severity levels: Critical, High, Medium, Low
User accounts with profiles via Supabase Auth
Supabase PostgreSQL backend with row-level security
publicApiSurface: GET /antipatterns - Browse the full antipattern catalog
GET /antipatterns/[slug] - View a single antipattern case study

DbAntipattern interface: id, slug, title, excerpt, category, impact, cover_url, wcag_refs, nielsen_refs, code_fix, stat_line, why, bad_description, good_description, business_impact, pro_tip, user_story
AntipatternItem interface: title, category, impact, excerpt, slug, tilt
Category interface: title, description, icon, slug, tilt
upsert_antipattern() SQL function for seeding/updating antipatterns
Supabase RLS policies: antipatterns are publicly readable, profiles are owner-managed
